TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Kalalood i Cepo' == O demak i Cepo' (Tarawadaw 'Amis: Karawrawan a demak no Cepo', demak i Kiwit: Karawrawan a demak no Kiwit), ano eca Lalood i Cepo', kasasitoc no sofitay ato demak no sician i no Kalingko a kowan, kasasiwtocan itini i Cepo' ato Kiwit niyaro' no 'Amis ato Mancin a sifo, itiniay i 1877 miheca piliyang to Mancin sifo "O pipacomod to sakowan i yincumin a demak (Kaisanfufan)" a picingcing no sofitay, tahaikor masamangah no sofitay ira ko kapapatay no demak. Lalengatan no demak i Cepo', pakayniay i "Pacomod to sakowan i yincumin a demak (Kaisanfufan)" satawo' no Macin i pasawalian, saka ira ko sasiwtoc to itiniay niyaro' no 'Amis. Patangic ko sofitay no Mancin to i niyaro'ay finawlan mipalalan, misafelaw ato misamsam to yincumin, o niaanan ko sapiliyang no 'Amis a finawlan. Sakitini a demak, mapanono'en no sofitay pakaen to 'epah ko kapah no 'Amis, mapawaray konini a demak, tahaikor o tatiihay ko pahecian. Pakayni tonini a demak o nai ci Sen Paocen a "Pacomod to sakowan i yincumin a demak (Kaisanfufan)" a satawo', pacomoden ni Wu Guangliang ko sofitay tayni pasawali, pacofilo sa mipalalan nai Kohkoh tangasa i Cepo' to lalan, o niaanan ko sakapiliyang no Kiwit niyaro', Dafdaf niyaro', 'Amisay niyaro, itira to i Cepo' ko kasasiwtocan. Caay pakalowid ko sofitay no Mancin itiya. Orasaka o panono'ay mangahay ko demak ni Wu Guangliang, patirengen ko kali'epahan, misamangah to kapah no Cepo' niyaro'; tangasa i kafecolan a malasang, awaayto ko 'icel milifet, itiya o kowang ko sapipatay to finawlan, saka maemin to malefek ko kapah no 'Amis finacadan itini i Cepo'. Mayakyak kina ratoh i niyaro' i, misatapang to ko finawlan milaliw pakayni i lotolotokan ano eca miti'er to roma a niyaro' itiya . Ikor katengilan a sowal, o naitiniay i sa'owc no Kalingko Posong a "Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw" (Taivoan finacadan tamdaw) ko mipadangay to Mancin sofitay milood to 'Amis finacadan, dotocen ko nano sowal no Tacoang Taivoan tamdaw, pakayni tonini a demak o katatiihan: sa'ayaw ira ko kasasipaloko miselenay to fokoloh ko Taivoan ato 'Amis a tamdaw, akaa pipadang to sofitay no Mancin milood to Cepo' ya sanay, nika paseka a pisa'ada no sofitay no Mancin, mipadang aca micolo' to felac kakaenen, sakalalood, kaforawen no 'Amis mapapatapatay, saka ikor o kasasiwtocan to no konini a katatiihan a demak: ikor no kapatay no sofitay a maliwasak, tayra ko 'Amis a tamdaw i ka'ayaw no Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw picolo'an to dafong, sakalalood, wata to ko nipatayan nangra a kahengang to ko mata, manengneng ko Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw o pitapa', ira ko Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw misodoc to po'ot a mico'ay, pakanengneng ko tatihiay a Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw to kapatay no cefang i, ana mapatay kako nasa, misodoc to po'ot mipadang to kapot mipatay to 'Amis a tamdaw, romaroma a 'Amiis a tamdaw pakanengneng tonini i wata ko kalim, paretatenga o Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw caay pidoedo to telek nanoya milaop to mipatay to Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw, oya sato a Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw sawad hanto ko kolong ato paliding, comikay to milaliw minokay tayra i Tacoang, o cikay niyam matiya to o malonem ko kahacikay, so'elinay to ranikay milaliw to kalaloodan, katengilan pangkiway to romi'ad milakec to lotok tahira to i niyaro' Tacoang saan ko katengil, nika kalimelaan toya kolong ato i palidingay a dafong, nika manga'ay aca awaay ko cimadoka'ay a mapatay ko tamdaw sato, oya sato 'osaw ko kakaenen to saka'orip . O pisaheci pakafana': 1. O pipacomod to sakowan i yincumin a demak (Kaisanfufan) satawo': O sapipakakaaw no Mancin mi'emet to sawaliay no Taywan a tamdaw, saka o "Pipacomod to sakowan i yincumin a demak (Kaisanfufan)" ko pisatowo', ocoran ko sofitay tayni lotolotokan no pasawali, mipalalan, o cecay nai Kohkoh pasiCepo' lalan. Onini a pipalalan, tangsolay micalap to sofal no 'Amis finacadan ato liyok no ka'oripan, mangiwal ko sapiliyangaw no Kiwit, Dafdaf, 'Amisay niyaro' masamatira. 2. Malengat ko sakasasiwtoc: O pisalalanan itiya, kinapinapina ko sofitay no Mancin ato niyaro'ay no 'Amis a masasiwtoc, hato caay ho pakalowid ko sofitay no Mancin. O pisaranikayaw misalof to picalap mikowan no Mancin ni Wu Guangliang saka, o pipataheka misamangah misolot to kapah no Cepo' a niyaro', itira to i kakomaenan palipalaw mikowang a mipatay, 'aloman ko mapatayay kapah no 'Amis finacadan. Onini kasasipatay pacekok ko finawlan no niyaro', nanoya miteka milaliw ko finacadan a tamdaw, salongan tamdaw pasilotok, salongan tamdaw pasiroma niyaro' milaliw miliyas. 3. Katemik no niyaro': Ikor no demak i Cepo', o awaayto ko pakayraan no kapah no niyaro' itiya, lopisak sato milaliw koya mafadocay a finawlan, salongan tamdaw pasayra i lotok milaliw, salongan tamdaw miti'er i roma niyaro' milaliw. Roma katengilan a sowal, itiniay i sa'owacan no Kalingko Posong a "Tacoang tamdaw (Tangafolan) (Taivoan finacadan tamdaw) o namipadangay to sofitay no Mancin milood to 'Amis finacadan, nika oya Taivoan finacadan tamdaw o katatiihan i, nano matatelekay na'ayaw, nika o paseka a pisa'ada no sofitay no Mancin, mipadangay saheca micolo' to dafong, 'araw han i mapodoh aca ko 'Amis finacadan a tamdaw a masasitapa' mipatay, sakangalef ko kasasitiihan. 4. Kafiyol nonini a demak: Pakayni kalalood i Cepo' o nano picalap no Mancin itini i sawalian no Taywan a pisamoto, pahapinang to kacalemceman no Mancin ato yincumin finacadan konini itiya ho. Pahapinang tonini a demak sakasamo' no niyaro'ay 'Amis finacadan saka, salongan a finacadan tamdaw malafel awaay ko pasicowaan itiya. O Fakong yakofa i 2022 miheca midemak to piharatengan i 145 mihecaan a demak, pakayni tonini a demak mapatiyol o "Lalood i Cepo'" han to ko sowal, piharatengan tonini a likisi no demak. Itini i Cawi' pitilidan mapatireng ko piharatengan a sinalit lalood i Cepo', piharatengan tonini a likisi no demak. I 2022 miheca 8 folad, Fakong yakofa midemak to 145 mihecaan piharatengan demak, pangangan to lalood i Cepo' sanay . Pinengnengan to tilid
S.PHON: == kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦəpo~uʡ == o~u ɬ~ɮəmak i ʦəpo~uʡ (tarawaɬ~ɮaw ʡamis: karawrawan a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦəpo~uʡ, ɬ~ɮəmak i kiwit: karawrawan a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u kiwit), ano~u əʦa ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦəpo~uʡ, kasasito~uʦ no~u so~ufitaj ato~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u siʦian i no~u kaɾiŋko~u a ko~uwan, kasasiwto~uʦan itini i ʦəpo~uʡ ato~u kiwit nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis ato~u manʦin a sifo~u, itiniaj i **** miħəʦa piɾijaŋ to~u manʦin sifo~u "o~u pipaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u sako~uwan i jinʦo~u~umin a ɬ~ɮəmak (kaisanfo~u~ufan)" a piʦiŋʦiŋ no~u so~ufitaj, taħaiko~ur masamaŋaħ no~u so~ufitaj ira ko~u kapapataj no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. ɾaɾəŋatan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak i ʦəpo~uʡ, pakajniaj i "paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u sako~uwan i jinʦo~u~umin a ɬ~ɮəmak (kaisanfo~u~ufan)" satawo~uʡ no~u maʦin i pasawaɾian, saka ira ko~u sasiwto~uʦ to~u itiniaj nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis. pataŋiʦ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin to~u i nijaro~uʡaj finawɾan mipaɾaɾan, misafəɾaw ato~u misamsam to~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~u niaanan ko~u sapiɾijaŋ no~u ʡamis a finawɾan. sakitini a ɬ~ɮəmak, mapano~uno~uʡən no~u so~ufitaj pakaən to~u ʡəpaħ ko~u kapaħ no~u ʡamis, mapawaraj ko~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, taħaiko~ur o~u tatiiħaj ko~u paħəʦian. pakajni to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u nai ʦi sən pao~uʦən a "paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u sako~uwan i jinʦo~u~umin a ɬ~ɮəmak (kaisanfo~u~ufan)" a satawo~uʡ, paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮən ni wo~u~u *o~u~uaŋɾiaŋ ko~u so~ufitaj tajni pasawaɾi, paʦo~ufiɾo~u sa mipaɾaɾan nai ko~uħko~uħ taŋasa i ʦəpo~uʡ to~u ɾaɾan, o~u niaanan ko~u sakapiɾijaŋ no~u kiwit nijaro~uʡ, ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf nijaro~uʡ, ʡamisaj nijaro~u, itira to~u i ʦəpo~uʡ ko~u kasasiwto~uʦan. ʦaaj pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin itija. o~urasaka o~u pano~uno~uʡaj maŋaħaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ni wo~u~u *o~u~uaŋɾiaŋ, patirəŋən ko~u kaɾiʡəpaħan, misamaŋaħ to~u kapaħ no~u ʦəpo~uʡ nijaro~uʡ; taŋasa i kafəʦo~uɾan a maɾasaŋ, awaajto~u ko~u ʡiʦəɾ miɾifət, itija o~u ko~uwaŋ ko~u sapipataj to~u finawɾan, saka maəmin to~u maɾəfək ko~u kapaħ no~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan itini i ʦəpo~uʡ. majakjak kina rato~uħ i nijaro~uʡ i, misatapaŋ to~u ko~u finawɾan miɾaɾiw pakajni i ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan ano~u əʦa mitiʡər to~u ro~uma a nijaro~uʡ itija . iko~ur katəŋiɾan a so~uwaɾ, o~u naitiniaj i saʡo~uwʦ no~u kaɾiŋko~u po~uso~uŋ a "taʦo~uaŋ (taŋafo~uɾan) tamɬ~ɮaw" (taib~vo~uan finaʦaɬ~ɮan tamɬ~ɮaw) ko~u mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj to~u manʦin so~ufitaj miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦən ko~u nano~u so~uwaɾ no~u taʦo~uaŋ taib~vo~uan tamɬ~ɮaw, pakajni to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u katatiiħan: saʡajaw ira ko~u kasasipaɾo~uko~u misəɾənaj to~u fo~uko~uɾo~uħ ko~u taib~vo~uan ato~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, akaa pipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ʦəpo~uʡ ja sanaj, nika pasəka a pisaʡaɬ~ɮa no~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin, mipaɬ~ɮaŋ aʦa miʦo~uɾo~uʡ to~u fəɾaʦ kakaənən, sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, kafo~urawən no~u ʡamis mapapatapataj, saka iko~ur o~u kasasiwto~uʦan to~u no~u ko~unini a katatiiħan a ɬ~ɮəmak: iko~ur no~u kapataj no~u so~ufitaj a maɾiwasak, tajra ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw i kaʡajaw no~u taʦo~uaŋ (taŋafo~uɾan) tamɬ~ɮaw piʦo~uɾo~uʡan to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, wata to~u ko~u nipatajan naŋra a kaħəŋaŋ to~u ko~u mata, manəŋnəŋ ko~u taʦo~uaŋ (taŋafo~uɾan) tamɬ~ɮaw o~u pitapaʡ, ira ko~u taʦo~uaŋ (taŋafo~uɾan) tamɬ~ɮaw miso~uɬ~ɮo~uʦ to~u po~uʡo~ut a miʦo~uʡaj, pakanəŋnəŋ ko~u tatiħiaj a taʦo~uaŋ (taŋafo~uɾan) tamɬ~ɮaw to~u kapataj no~u ʦəfaŋ i, ana mapataj kako~u nasa, miso~uɬ~ɮo~uʦ to~u po~uʡo~ut mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kapo~ut mipataj to~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, ro~umaro~uma a ʡamiis a tamɬ~ɮaw pakanəŋnəŋ to~unini i wata ko~u kaɾim, parətatəŋa o~u taʦo~uaŋ (taŋafo~uɾan) tamɬ~ɮaw ʦaaj piɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u təɾək nano~uja miɾao~up to~u mipataj to~u taʦo~uaŋ (taŋafo~uɾan) tamɬ~ɮaw, o~uja sato~u a taʦo~uaŋ (taŋafo~uɾan) tamɬ~ɮaw sawaɬ~ɮ ħanto~u ko~u ko~uɾo~uŋ ato~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ, ʦo~umikaj to~u miɾaɾiw mino~ukaj tajra i taʦo~uaŋ, o~u ʦikaj nijam matija to~u o~u maɾo~unəm ko~u kaħaʦikaj, so~uʡəɾinaj to~u ranikaj miɾaɾiw to~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan, katəŋiɾan paŋkiwaj to~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɾakəʦ to~u ɾo~uto~uk taħira to~u i nijaro~uʡ taʦo~uaŋ saan ko~u katəŋiɾ, nika kaɾiməɾaan to~uja ko~uɾo~uŋ ato~u i paɾiɬ~ɮiŋaj a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, nika maŋaʡaj aʦa awaaj ko~u ʦimaɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj a mapataj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw sato~u, o~uja sato~u ʡo~usaw ko~u kakaənən to~u sakaʡo~urip . o~u pisaħəʦi pakafanaʡ: *. o~u pipaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u sako~uwan i jinʦo~u~umin a ɬ~ɮəmak (kaisanfo~u~ufan) satawo~uʡ: o~u sapipakakaaw no~u manʦin miʡəmət to~u sawaɾiaj no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw, saka o~u "pipaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u sako~uwan i jinʦo~u~umin a ɬ~ɮəmak (kaisanfo~u~ufan)" ko~u pisato~uwo~uʡ, o~uʦo~uran ko~u so~ufitaj tajni ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan no~u pasawaɾi, mipaɾaɾan, o~u ʦəʦaj nai ko~uħko~uħ pasiʦəpo~uʡ ɾaɾan. o~unini a pipaɾaɾan, taŋso~uɾaj miʦaɾap to~u so~ufaɾ no~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u ɾijo~uk no~u kaʡo~uripan, maŋiwaɾ ko~u sapiɾijaŋaw no~u kiwit, ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf, ʡamisaj nijaro~uʡ masamatira. *. maɾəŋat ko~u sakasasiwto~uʦ: o~u pisaɾaɾanan itija, kinapinapina ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin ato~u nijaro~uʡaj no~u ʡamis a masasiwto~uʦ, ħato~u ʦaaj ħo~u pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin. o~u pisaranikajaw misaɾo~uf to~u piʦaɾap miko~uwan no~u manʦin ni wo~u~u *o~u~uaŋɾiaŋ saka, o~u pipataħəka misamaŋaħ miso~uɾo~ut to~u kapaħ no~u ʦəpo~uʡ a nijaro~uʡ, itira to~u i kako~umaənan paɾipaɾaw miko~uwaŋ a mipataj, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u mapatajaj kapaħ no~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan. o~unini kasasipataj paʦəko~uk ko~u finawɾan no~u nijaro~uʡ, nano~uja mitəka miɾaɾiw ko~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a tamɬ~ɮaw, saɾo~uŋan tamɬ~ɮaw pasiɾo~uto~uk, saɾo~uŋan tamɬ~ɮaw pasiro~uma nijaro~uʡ miɾaɾiw miɾijas. *. katəmik no~u nijaro~uʡ: iko~ur no~u ɬ~ɮəmak i ʦəpo~uʡ, o~u awaajto~u ko~u pakajraan no~u kapaħ no~u nijaro~uʡ itija, ɾo~upisak sato~u miɾaɾiw ko~uja mafaɬ~ɮo~uʦaj a finawɾan, saɾo~uŋan tamɬ~ɮaw pasajra i ɾo~uto~uk miɾaɾiw, saɾo~uŋan tamɬ~ɮaw mitiʡər i ro~uma nijaro~uʡ miɾaɾiw. ro~uma katəŋiɾan a so~uwaɾ, itiniaj i saʡo~uwaʦan no~u kaɾiŋko~u po~uso~uŋ a "taʦo~uaŋ tamɬ~ɮaw (taŋafo~uɾan) (taib~vo~uan finaʦaɬ~ɮan tamɬ~ɮaw) o~u namipaɬ~ɮaŋaj to~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan, nika o~uja taib~vo~uan finaʦaɬ~ɮan tamɬ~ɮaw o~u katatiiħan i, nano~u matatəɾəkaj naʡajaw, nika o~u pasəka a pisaʡaɬ~ɮa no~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin, mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj saħəʦa miʦo~uɾo~uʡ to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, ʡaraw ħan i mapo~uɬ~ɮo~uħ aʦa ko~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan a tamɬ~ɮaw a masasitapaʡ mipataj, sakaŋaɾəf ko~u kasasitiiħan. *. kafijo~uɾ no~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak: pakajni kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦəpo~uʡ o~u nano~u piʦaɾap no~u manʦin itini i sawaɾian no~u tajwan a pisamo~uto~u, paħapinaŋ to~u kaʦaɾəmʦəman no~u manʦin ato~u jinʦo~u~umin finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~unini itija ħo~u. paħapinaŋ to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak sakasamo~uʡ no~u nijaro~uʡaj ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan saka, saɾo~uŋan a finaʦaɬ~ɮan tamɬ~ɮaw maɾafəɾ awaaj ko~u pasiʦo~uwaan itija. o~u fako~uŋ jako~ufa i **** miħəʦa miɬ~ɮəmak to~u piħaratəŋan i *** miħəʦaan a ɬ~ɮəmak, pakajni to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak mapatijo~uɾ o~u "ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦəpo~uʡ" ħan to~u ko~u so~uwaɾ, piħaratəŋan to~unini a ɾikisi no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. itini i ʦawiʡ pitiɾiɬ~ɮan mapatirəŋ ko~u piħaratəŋan a sinaɾit ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦəpo~uʡ, piħaratəŋan to~unini a ɾikisi no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, fako~uŋ jako~ufa miɬ~ɮəmak to~u *** miħəʦaan piħaratəŋan ɬ~ɮəmak, paŋaŋan to~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦəpo~uʡ sanaj . pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ
S.FORM: == Kalalood i Cepo' == O demak i Cepo' (Tarawadaw 'Amis: Karawrawan a demak no Cepo', demak i Kiwit: Karawrawan a demak no Kiwit), ano eca Lalood i Cepo', kasasitoc no sofitay ato demak no sician i no Kalingko a kowan, kasasiwtocan itini i Cepo' ato Kiwit niyaro' no 'Amis ato Mancin a sifo, itiniay i 1877 miheca piliyang to Mancin sifo "O pipacomod to sakowan i yincumin a demak (Kaisanfufan)" a picingcing no sofitay, tahaikor masamangah no sofitay ira ko kapapatay no demak. Lalengatan no demak i Cepo', pakayniay i "Pacomod to sakowan i yincumin a demak (Kaisanfufan)" satawo' no Macin i pasawalian, saka ira ko sasiwtoc to itiniay niyaro' no 'Amis. Patangic ko sofitay no Mancin to i niyaro'ay finawlan mipalalan, misafelaw ato misamsam to yincumin, o niaanan ko sapiliyang no 'Amis a finawlan. Sakitini a demak, mapanono'en no sofitay pakaen to 'epah ko kapah no 'Amis, mapawaray konini a demak, tahaikor o tatiihay ko pahecian. Pakayni tonini a demak o nai ci Sen Paocen a "Pacomod to sakowan i yincumin a demak (Kaisanfufan)" a satawo', pacomoden ni Wu Guangliang ko sofitay tayni pasawali, pacofilo sa mipalalan nai Kohkoh tangasa i Cepo' to lalan, o niaanan ko sakapiliyang no Kiwit niyaro', Dafdaf niyaro', 'Amisay niyaro, itira to i Cepo' ko kasasiwtocan. Caay pakalowid ko sofitay no Mancin itiya. Orasaka o panono'ay mangahay ko demak ni Wu Guangliang, patirengen ko kali'epahan, misamangah to kapah no Cepo' niyaro'; tangasa i kafecolan a malasang, awaayto ko 'icel milifet, itiya o kowang ko sapipatay to finawlan, saka maemin to malefek ko kapah no 'Amis finacadan itini i Cepo'. Mayakyak kina ratoh i niyaro' i, misatapang to ko finawlan milaliw pakayni i lotolotokan ano eca miti'er to roma a niyaro' itiya . Ikor katengilan a sowal, o naitiniay i sa'owc no Kalingko Posong a "Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw" (Taivoan finacadan tamdaw) ko mipadangay to Mancin sofitay milood to 'Amis finacadan, dotocen ko nano sowal no Tacoang Taivoan tamdaw, pakayni tonini a demak o katatiihan: sa'ayaw ira ko kasasipaloko miselenay to fokoloh ko Taivoan ato 'Amis a tamdaw, akaa pipadang to sofitay no Mancin milood to Cepo' ya sanay, nika paseka a pisa'ada no sofitay no Mancin, mipadang aca micolo' to felac kakaenen, sakalalood, kaforawen no 'Amis mapapatapatay, saka ikor o kasasiwtocan to no konini a katatiihan a demak: ikor no kapatay no sofitay a maliwasak, tayra ko 'Amis a tamdaw i ka'ayaw no Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw picolo'an to dafong, sakalalood, wata to ko nipatayan nangra a kahengang to ko mata, manengneng ko Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw o pitapa', ira ko Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw misodoc to po'ot a mico'ay, pakanengneng ko tatihiay a Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw to kapatay no cefang i, ana mapatay kako nasa, misodoc to po'ot mipadang to kapot mipatay to 'Amis a tamdaw, romaroma a 'Amiis a tamdaw pakanengneng tonini i wata ko kalim, paretatenga o Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw caay pidoedo to telek nanoya milaop to mipatay to Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw, oya sato a Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw sawad hanto ko kolong ato paliding, comikay to milaliw minokay tayra i Tacoang, o cikay niyam matiya to o malonem ko kahacikay, so'elinay to ranikay milaliw to kalaloodan, katengilan pangkiway to romi'ad milakec to lotok tahira to i niyaro' Tacoang saan ko katengil, nika kalimelaan toya kolong ato i palidingay a dafong, nika manga'ay aca awaay ko cimadoka'ay a mapatay ko tamdaw sato, oya sato 'osaw ko kakaenen to saka'orip . O pisaheci pakafana': 1. O pipacomod to sakowan i yincumin a demak (Kaisanfufan) satawo': O sapipakakaaw no Mancin mi'emet to sawaliay no Taywan a tamdaw, saka o "Pipacomod to sakowan i yincumin a demak (Kaisanfufan)" ko pisatowo', ocoran ko sofitay tayni lotolotokan no pasawali, mipalalan, o cecay nai Kohkoh pasiCepo' lalan. Onini a pipalalan, tangsolay micalap to sofal no 'Amis finacadan ato liyok no ka'oripan, mangiwal ko sapiliyangaw no Kiwit, Dafdaf, 'Amisay niyaro' masamatira. 2. Malengat ko sakasasiwtoc: O pisalalanan itiya, kinapinapina ko sofitay no Mancin ato niyaro'ay no 'Amis a masasiwtoc, hato caay ho pakalowid ko sofitay no Mancin. O pisaranikayaw misalof to picalap mikowan no Mancin ni Wu Guangliang saka, o pipataheka misamangah misolot to kapah no Cepo' a niyaro', itira to i kakomaenan palipalaw mikowang a mipatay, 'aloman ko mapatayay kapah no 'Amis finacadan. Onini kasasipatay pacekok ko finawlan no niyaro', nanoya miteka milaliw ko finacadan a tamdaw, salongan tamdaw pasilotok, salongan tamdaw pasiroma niyaro' milaliw miliyas. 3. Katemik no niyaro': Ikor no demak i Cepo', o awaayto ko pakayraan no kapah no niyaro' itiya, lopisak sato milaliw koya mafadocay a finawlan, salongan tamdaw pasayra i lotok milaliw, salongan tamdaw miti'er i roma niyaro' milaliw. Roma katengilan a sowal, itiniay i sa'owacan no Kalingko Posong a "Tacoang tamdaw (Tangafolan) (Taivoan finacadan tamdaw) o namipadangay to sofitay no Mancin milood to 'Amis finacadan, nika oya Taivoan finacadan tamdaw o katatiihan i, nano matatelekay na'ayaw, nika o paseka a pisa'ada no sofitay no Mancin, mipadangay saheca micolo' to dafong, 'araw han i mapodoh aca ko 'Amis finacadan a tamdaw a masasitapa' mipatay, sakangalef ko kasasitiihan. 4. Kafiyol nonini a demak: Pakayni kalalood i Cepo' o nano picalap no Mancin itini i sawalian no Taywan a pisamoto, pahapinang to kacalemceman no Mancin ato yincumin finacadan konini itiya ho. Pahapinang tonini a demak sakasamo' no niyaro'ay 'Amis finacadan saka, salongan a finacadan tamdaw malafel awaay ko pasicowaan itiya. O Fakong yakofa i 2022 miheca midemak to piharatengan i 145 mihecaan a demak, pakayni tonini a demak mapatiyol o "Lalood i Cepo'" han to ko sowal, piharatengan tonini a likisi no demak. Itini i Cawi' pitilidan mapatireng ko piharatengan a sinalit lalood i Cepo', piharatengan tonini a likisi no demak. I 2022 miheca 8 folad, Fakong yakofa midemak to 145 mihecaan piharatengan demak, pangangan to lalood i Cepo' sanay . Pinengnengan to tilid
S.PHON: == kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦəpo~uʡ == o~u ɬ~ɮəmak i ʦəpo~uʡ (tarawaɬ~ɮaw ʡamis: karawrawan a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦəpo~uʡ, ɬ~ɮəmak i kiwit: karawrawan a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u kiwit), ano~u əʦa ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦəpo~uʡ, kasasito~uʦ no~u so~ufitaj ato~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u siʦian i no~u kaɾiŋko~u a ko~uwan, kasasiwto~uʦan itini i ʦəpo~uʡ ato~u kiwit nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis ato~u manʦin a sifo~u, itiniaj i **** miħəʦa piɾijaŋ to~u manʦin sifo~u "o~u pipaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u sako~uwan i jinʦo~u~umin a ɬ~ɮəmak (kaisanfo~u~ufan)" a piʦiŋʦiŋ no~u so~ufitaj, taħaiko~ur masamaŋaħ no~u so~ufitaj ira ko~u kapapataj no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. ɾaɾəŋatan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak i ʦəpo~uʡ, pakajniaj i "paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u sako~uwan i jinʦo~u~umin a ɬ~ɮəmak (kaisanfo~u~ufan)" satawo~uʡ no~u maʦin i pasawaɾian, saka ira ko~u sasiwto~uʦ to~u itiniaj nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis. pataŋiʦ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin to~u i nijaro~uʡaj finawɾan mipaɾaɾan, misafəɾaw ato~u misamsam to~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~u niaanan ko~u sapiɾijaŋ no~u ʡamis a finawɾan. sakitini a ɬ~ɮəmak, mapano~uno~uʡən no~u so~ufitaj pakaən to~u ʡəpaħ ko~u kapaħ no~u ʡamis, mapawaraj ko~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, taħaiko~ur o~u tatiiħaj ko~u paħəʦian. pakajni to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u nai ʦi sən pao~uʦən a "paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u sako~uwan i jinʦo~u~umin a ɬ~ɮəmak (kaisanfo~u~ufan)" a satawo~uʡ, paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮən ni wo~u~u *o~u~uaŋɾiaŋ ko~u so~ufitaj tajni pasawaɾi, paʦo~ufiɾo~u sa mipaɾaɾan nai ko~uħko~uħ taŋasa i ʦəpo~uʡ to~u ɾaɾan, o~u niaanan ko~u sakapiɾijaŋ no~u kiwit nijaro~uʡ, ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf nijaro~uʡ, ʡamisaj nijaro~u, itira to~u i ʦəpo~uʡ ko~u kasasiwto~uʦan. ʦaaj pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin itija. o~urasaka o~u pano~uno~uʡaj maŋaħaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ni wo~u~u *o~u~uaŋɾiaŋ, patirəŋən ko~u kaɾiʡəpaħan, misamaŋaħ to~u kapaħ no~u ʦəpo~uʡ nijaro~uʡ; taŋasa i kafəʦo~uɾan a maɾasaŋ, awaajto~u ko~u ʡiʦəɾ miɾifət, itija o~u ko~uwaŋ ko~u sapipataj to~u finawɾan, saka maəmin to~u maɾəfək ko~u kapaħ no~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan itini i ʦəpo~uʡ. majakjak kina rato~uħ i nijaro~uʡ i, misatapaŋ to~u ko~u finawɾan miɾaɾiw pakajni i ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan ano~u əʦa mitiʡər to~u ro~uma a nijaro~uʡ itija . iko~ur katəŋiɾan a so~uwaɾ, o~u naitiniaj i saʡo~uwʦ no~u kaɾiŋko~u po~uso~uŋ a "taʦo~uaŋ (taŋafo~uɾan) tamɬ~ɮaw" (taib~vo~uan finaʦaɬ~ɮan tamɬ~ɮaw) ko~u mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj to~u manʦin so~ufitaj miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦən ko~u nano~u so~uwaɾ no~u taʦo~uaŋ taib~vo~uan tamɬ~ɮaw, pakajni to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u katatiiħan: saʡajaw ira ko~u kasasipaɾo~uko~u misəɾənaj to~u fo~uko~uɾo~uħ ko~u taib~vo~uan ato~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, akaa pipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ʦəpo~uʡ ja sanaj, nika pasəka a pisaʡaɬ~ɮa no~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin, mipaɬ~ɮaŋ aʦa miʦo~uɾo~uʡ to~u fəɾaʦ kakaənən, sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, kafo~urawən no~u ʡamis mapapatapataj, saka iko~ur o~u kasasiwto~uʦan to~u no~u ko~unini a katatiiħan a ɬ~ɮəmak: iko~ur no~u kapataj no~u so~ufitaj a maɾiwasak, tajra ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw i kaʡajaw no~u taʦo~uaŋ (taŋafo~uɾan) tamɬ~ɮaw piʦo~uɾo~uʡan to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, wata to~u ko~u nipatajan naŋra a kaħəŋaŋ to~u ko~u mata, manəŋnəŋ ko~u taʦo~uaŋ (taŋafo~uɾan) tamɬ~ɮaw o~u pitapaʡ, ira ko~u taʦo~uaŋ (taŋafo~uɾan) tamɬ~ɮaw miso~uɬ~ɮo~uʦ to~u po~uʡo~ut a miʦo~uʡaj, pakanəŋnəŋ ko~u tatiħiaj a taʦo~uaŋ (taŋafo~uɾan) tamɬ~ɮaw to~u kapataj no~u ʦəfaŋ i, ana mapataj kako~u nasa, miso~uɬ~ɮo~uʦ to~u po~uʡo~ut mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kapo~ut mipataj to~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, ro~umaro~uma a ʡamiis a tamɬ~ɮaw pakanəŋnəŋ to~unini i wata ko~u kaɾim, parətatəŋa o~u taʦo~uaŋ (taŋafo~uɾan) tamɬ~ɮaw ʦaaj piɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u təɾək nano~uja miɾao~up to~u mipataj to~u taʦo~uaŋ (taŋafo~uɾan) tamɬ~ɮaw, o~uja sato~u a taʦo~uaŋ (taŋafo~uɾan) tamɬ~ɮaw sawaɬ~ɮ ħanto~u ko~u ko~uɾo~uŋ ato~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ, ʦo~umikaj to~u miɾaɾiw mino~ukaj tajra i taʦo~uaŋ, o~u ʦikaj nijam matija to~u o~u maɾo~unəm ko~u kaħaʦikaj, so~uʡəɾinaj to~u ranikaj miɾaɾiw to~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan, katəŋiɾan paŋkiwaj to~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɾakəʦ to~u ɾo~uto~uk taħira to~u i nijaro~uʡ taʦo~uaŋ saan ko~u katəŋiɾ, nika kaɾiməɾaan to~uja ko~uɾo~uŋ ato~u i paɾiɬ~ɮiŋaj a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, nika maŋaʡaj aʦa awaaj ko~u ʦimaɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj a mapataj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw sato~u, o~uja sato~u ʡo~usaw ko~u kakaənən to~u sakaʡo~urip . o~u pisaħəʦi pakafanaʡ: *. o~u pipaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u sako~uwan i jinʦo~u~umin a ɬ~ɮəmak (kaisanfo~u~ufan) satawo~uʡ: o~u sapipakakaaw no~u manʦin miʡəmət to~u sawaɾiaj no~u tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw, saka o~u "pipaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u sako~uwan i jinʦo~u~umin a ɬ~ɮəmak (kaisanfo~u~ufan)" ko~u pisato~uwo~uʡ, o~uʦo~uran ko~u so~ufitaj tajni ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan no~u pasawaɾi, mipaɾaɾan, o~u ʦəʦaj nai ko~uħko~uħ pasiʦəpo~uʡ ɾaɾan. o~unini a pipaɾaɾan, taŋso~uɾaj miʦaɾap to~u so~ufaɾ no~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u ɾijo~uk no~u kaʡo~uripan, maŋiwaɾ ko~u sapiɾijaŋaw no~u kiwit, ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf, ʡamisaj nijaro~uʡ masamatira. *. maɾəŋat ko~u sakasasiwto~uʦ: o~u pisaɾaɾanan itija, kinapinapina ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin ato~u nijaro~uʡaj no~u ʡamis a masasiwto~uʦ, ħato~u ʦaaj ħo~u pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin. o~u pisaranikajaw misaɾo~uf to~u piʦaɾap miko~uwan no~u manʦin ni wo~u~u *o~u~uaŋɾiaŋ saka, o~u pipataħəka misamaŋaħ miso~uɾo~ut to~u kapaħ no~u ʦəpo~uʡ a nijaro~uʡ, itira to~u i kako~umaənan paɾipaɾaw miko~uwaŋ a mipataj, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u mapatajaj kapaħ no~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan. o~unini kasasipataj paʦəko~uk ko~u finawɾan no~u nijaro~uʡ, nano~uja mitəka miɾaɾiw ko~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a tamɬ~ɮaw, saɾo~uŋan tamɬ~ɮaw pasiɾo~uto~uk, saɾo~uŋan tamɬ~ɮaw pasiro~uma nijaro~uʡ miɾaɾiw miɾijas. *. katəmik no~u nijaro~uʡ: iko~ur no~u ɬ~ɮəmak i ʦəpo~uʡ, o~u awaajto~u ko~u pakajraan no~u kapaħ no~u nijaro~uʡ itija, ɾo~upisak sato~u miɾaɾiw ko~uja mafaɬ~ɮo~uʦaj a finawɾan, saɾo~uŋan tamɬ~ɮaw pasajra i ɾo~uto~uk miɾaɾiw, saɾo~uŋan tamɬ~ɮaw mitiʡər i ro~uma nijaro~uʡ miɾaɾiw. ro~uma katəŋiɾan a so~uwaɾ, itiniaj i saʡo~uwaʦan no~u kaɾiŋko~u po~uso~uŋ a "taʦo~uaŋ tamɬ~ɮaw (taŋafo~uɾan) (taib~vo~uan finaʦaɬ~ɮan tamɬ~ɮaw) o~u namipaɬ~ɮaŋaj to~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan, nika o~uja taib~vo~uan finaʦaɬ~ɮan tamɬ~ɮaw o~u katatiiħan i, nano~u matatəɾəkaj naʡajaw, nika o~u pasəka a pisaʡaɬ~ɮa no~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin, mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj saħəʦa miʦo~uɾo~uʡ to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, ʡaraw ħan i mapo~uɬ~ɮo~uħ aʦa ko~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan a tamɬ~ɮaw a masasitapaʡ mipataj, sakaŋaɾəf ko~u kasasitiiħan. *. kafijo~uɾ no~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak: pakajni kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦəpo~uʡ o~u nano~u piʦaɾap no~u manʦin itini i sawaɾian no~u tajwan a pisamo~uto~u, paħapinaŋ to~u kaʦaɾəmʦəman no~u manʦin ato~u jinʦo~u~umin finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~unini itija ħo~u. paħapinaŋ to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak sakasamo~uʡ no~u nijaro~uʡaj ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan saka, saɾo~uŋan a finaʦaɬ~ɮan tamɬ~ɮaw maɾafəɾ awaaj ko~u pasiʦo~uwaan itija. o~u fako~uŋ jako~ufa i **** miħəʦa miɬ~ɮəmak to~u piħaratəŋan i *** miħəʦaan a ɬ~ɮəmak, pakajni to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak mapatijo~uɾ o~u "ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦəpo~uʡ" ħan to~u ko~u so~uwaɾ, piħaratəŋan to~unini a ɾikisi no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. itini i ʦawiʡ pitiɾiɬ~ɮan mapatirəŋ ko~u piħaratəŋan a sinaɾit ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦəpo~uʡ, piħaratəŋan to~unini a ɾikisi no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, fako~uŋ jako~ufa miɬ~ɮəmak to~u *** miħəʦaan piħaratəŋan ɬ~ɮəmak, paŋaŋan to~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦəpo~uʡ sanaj . pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ
